x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Modified OOB fields (renamed labels, changed mandatory rules) can cause Now Assist to reference field names that do not match what agents see, leading to confusing or incorrect AI suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review overridden incident fields via sys_dictionary_override. Ensure field labels visible to agents match what Now Assist references in AI suggestions. Document any renamed fields for the Now Assist configuration team.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c54
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Modified OOB fields (renamed labels, changed mandatory rules) can cause Now Assist to reference field names that do not match what agents see, leading to confusing or incorrect AI suggestions.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Modified OOB Fields on Incident</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_dictionary_override');
    ga.addQuery('name', 'incident');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' field overrides on incident table';

    if (count === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No OOB field overrides on incident. Now Assist field references will match standard field labels and behaviors without customization conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count < 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' OOB field overrides on incident. Review renamed or mandatory-changed fields — ensure labels visible to agents match what Now Assist references in AI suggestions.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' OOB field overrides on incident. High override count may cause Now Assist to reference fields by names that no longer match the agent UI — document all overrides for the Now Assist configuration team.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000333</number><order>190</order><remediation_guidance>Review overridden incident fields via sys_dictionary_override. Ensure field labels visible to agents match what Now Assist references in AI suggestions. Document any renamed fields for the Now Assist configuration team.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c54</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Modified OOB Fields on Incident</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c54</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
